tooltip.elixirum.alchemist_eye: When equipped, lets you see the composition of discovered ingredients.
tooltip.elixirum.honey_solvent: Used at the Brewing Stand. Extracts one random essence from an ingredient, letting you discover what it's made of.
tooltip.elixirum.glass_cauldron: Used for brewing elixirs. Place it over a heat source to bring the water to a boil before adding ingredients.

ui.elixirum.mastery.description: Increase your overall mastery by perfecting individual recipes. As your mastery grows, you unlock new styles, up to a maximum mastery level of 100.

elixirum.screen.compendium.title: Compendium
elixirum.assessment.mixture: Is it juice? Is it medicine? Hard to tell. Something definitely happened in the brewing process… just not what you expected. Still, it looks safe enough. Probably fine to drink.
elixirum.assessment.pale: A barely-there concoction, closer to tinted water than a true potion. It doesn't do much, but at least it won't get in your way.
elixirum.assessment.cloudy: An unremarkable brew, caught somewhere between water and a proper potion. It carries a faint effect that quickly slips away, like a passing thought.
elixirum.assessment.weak: A fragile potion with subtle, fleeting effects. You might notice it for a moment—then wonder if you imagined it at all.
elixirum.assessment.minor: A simple, modest potion. Its effects are brief and gentle, but can still lend a small helping hand when needed.
elixirum.assessment.moderate: A reliable potion with a steady, noticeable effect. Nothing extravagant, but dependable enough to make a difference.
elixirum.assessment.grand: A well-crafted potion with a balanced and lasting effect. It fits naturally into most situations, offering consistent results.
elixirum.assessment.intense: A potent brew with sharp, pronounced effects. It acts quickly and lingers, leaving little room for doubt.
elixirum.assessment.supreme: An exceptional potion with refined and powerful effects. Its presence is unmistakable, shaping the outcome in your favor.
elixirum.assessment.legendary: A near-mythical elixir, spoken of in hushed tones. Its effects border on the extraordinary, capable of turning the tide when it matters most.
elixirum.assessment.mixed_effect: The potion causes several different effects. These combinations can be useful in certain situations, but their interaction should be considered based on specific needs.
style.elixirum.locked: Reach mastery level %s to unlock and use this style.
toast.elixirum.level_up.title: Mastery Level Up!
